headline: 3 Leading Dividend Stocks Yielding Over 3%
summary: The United States market has shown positive momentum, climbing 1.1% in the last week and an impressive 27% over the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 17% annually. In this thriving environment, selecting dividend stocks yielding over 3% can be a strategic choice for investors seeking steady income alongside potential capital appreciation.

headline: MARA Barely Moves Since Missing Q1 Earnings & Revenue Estimates
summary: Marathon Digital misses Q1 estimates as lower bitcoin prices, rising costs and digital asset losses weigh on results, widening quarterly losses.

headline: ServiceNow AI Partnerships Aim To Turn Pilot Projects Into Core Workflows
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) and Accenture launched a forward-deployed engineering program to embed AI-native teams directly into client environments. The program focuses on moving agentic AI and workflow automation projects from pilots into full production at enterprise scale. ServiceNow expanded its partnership with FedEx Dataworks, integrating real-time logistics data into Source-to-Pay workflows. The FedEx Dataworks integration targets automated responses to supply disruptions and more...
